pytorch.reason: torch discretization of S^2 curvature 2-form tensor and numerical integration — load-bearing

pyg.reason: graph coupling handled by rustworkx; PyG message passing not required for gerbe holonomy probe

z3.reason: z3 UNSAT proof that curvature integral = 0 is excluded — primary non-triviality guard

cvc5.reason: z3 SMT sufficient for curvature non-triviality checks; cvc5 redundant on real interval arithmetic

sympy.reason: exact symbolic integration of S^2 curvature form and torus holonomy phase computation

clifford.reason: Cl(3,0) bivector represents gerbe B-field connection on the constraint manifold

geomstats.reason: geomstats S^2 sampling attempted; sympy confirms layer A geometry independently

e3nn.reason: e3nn spherical harmonics probe S^2 geometry normalization for gerbe curvature layer

rustworkx.reason: rustworkx graph encodes pairwise shell coupling topology between gerbe layers A and B

xgi.reason: xgi hyperedge encodes the shared coupling constraint between layer A and layer B gerbe holonomies

toponetx.reason: TopoNetX CellComplex encodes S^2 gerbe holonomy as oriented 2-cell patches

gudhi.reason: gudhi persistence filtration over gerbe curvature values — probes connectivity of holonomy space

P1_s2_gerbe_curvature_integral_4pi.note: gerbe curvature 2-form on S^2 integrates to 4π — non-trivial holonomy survives sympy probe

P2_torch_s2_curvature_numerical.note: torch numerical integration of S^2 curvature form survives 2% tolerance probe

P3_z3_curvature_nonzero_unsat.note: z3 UNSAT confirms zero-curvature cannot be satisfied — non-trivial gerbe excluded from trivial class

P4_clifford_gerbe_bivector_nonzero.note: Clifford Cl(3,0) bivector B-field survives non-zero norm probe — gerbe connection is non-trivial

P5_torus_holonomy_winding_one.note: torus gerbe k=1 holonomy is trivial (flat connection) — T^2 shell B-layer excluded from non-trivial holonomy probe

N1_trivial_gerbe_curvature_zero_sat.note: trivial gerbe with zero curvature is z3 SAT — trivially admitted but excluded from non-trivial class

N2_pairwise_coupling_curvature_survives.note: z3 UNSAT confirms curvature_A cannot be annihilated in pairwise coupling — A's holonomy survives B active

N3_zero_bfield_trivial_holonomy.note: k=0 B-field gives holonomy=1 (trivial) — zero curvature excluded from non-trivial gerbe probe

N4_clifford_zero_bivector_excluded.note: zero Clifford bivector excluded from non-trivial gerbe connection — norm=0 confirms trivial B-field

B1_geomstats_s2_layer_A_geometry.note: geomstats backend issue (module 'geomstats' has no attribute 'setup_backend'); layer A S^2 geometry confirmed via sympy integral

B2_rustworkx_pairwise_shell_graph.note: rustworkx undirected graph encodes pairwise shell coupling between layer A (S^2) and layer B (T^2)

B3_toponetx_holonomy_cells.note: TopoNetX CellComplex encodes S^2 holonomy patches as oriented 2-cells — layer A topology survives

B4_gudhi_curvature_filtration.note: gudhi Rips filtration over curvature values connects non-trivial gerbes — topology survives persistence probe

B5_xgi_pairwise_coupling_hyperedge.note: xgi hyperedge encodes shared holonomy coupling constraint between pairwise shells

B6_e3nn_spherical_harmonic_l0.note: e3nn spherical harmonic Y_0^0 on S^2 survives normalization probe — spherical geometry confirmed
